feed.description: Solo, long-form reflections on biohacking: the state of the field in 2025, what actually works, and the ethics and limits of human optimization.
feed.title: The Long View: Biohacking

bullets: Today we're talking about macroeconomics, and I'm joined by Skanda Amarnauth, returning macro economist.
Skanda Amarnauth, thanks for being here.

summary.title: The Long View: Biohacking — Episode 2 — synthetic
